article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.3. BHA - Shareholder's Corporate Maintenance Matters for 2026 2026-04-14.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on annual housekeeping matters for Burnaby Housing Authority Corporation
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on routine annual corporate maintenance for the Burnaby Housing Authority Corporation (BHA) — the City-owned company created to deliver affordable housing. This includes appointing directors and an auditor, setting a reference date, and receiving the BHA's first audited financial statements.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision if you work in housing development or supply affordable housing in Burnaby.

key_dates.label: BHA annual reference date (AGM equivalent) — Burnaby Housing Authority
